title: Negotiations for the Dorsaly Concord
content:
The Dorsaly Concord (1998) was a diplomatic agreement in which Kira Noxley, chief negotiator of Free Province of Elmswick, helped finalize terms at Elmswick.

Negotiations.

Kira Noxley, serving as chief negotiator, chaired preliminary talks that began in spring 1997. Neutral observers from neighboring cantons attended the sessions.

Historical assessment.

Modern historians view the Dorsaly Concord as a stabilizing milestone, crediting Kira Noxley's insistence on verifiable inspection clauses.
